knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.subtitle: Drop your sources in. Search them yourself. Let your team cite them too.
knowledge.uploadHint: Click the "Upload" button in the top-right to add a document

toolbar.searchPlaceholderEmpty: Pick a KB to start searching

sidebar.emptyDesc: Create a KB and start collecting your notes, PDFs, and clipped pages.
sidebar.pickKbHint: Pick a knowledge base from the toolbar on the left

kb.demoModeDetail: Search only matches keywords — it doesn't understand synonyms or meaning.

tools.title: Let your team look things up
tools.body: On the Employees page, give a teammate the "{skill}" skill — they'll be able to search this KB in chat and answer with citations.

docs.emptyDesc: Upload your first document (md, pdf, docx, html, txt). The agent parses, chunks, and embeds it within seconds.
docs.noFilterMatch: No documents match the current filter

search.loadingDesc: Matching keywords and semantics in parallel
search.noResults: No hits — try a more specific query, or tweak the BM25 / vector weights

create.title: New knowledge base
create.descriptionPlaceholder: What's in it · who reads it · any note that'll help future you
create.embeddingHelp: Grayed-out options need an API key — set one in .env to enable. Switching requires a reindex.

advanced.intro: You usually don't need to touch this. The two weights control whether keyword hits or semantic matches matter more;
advanced.introTopK: {topK} caps how many snippets each query returns.

diagnose.queryPlaceholder: Type a query to compare the three retrieval modes…
diagnose.intro: Type a query: the left column shows keyword-only hits, the middle shows semantic-only hits, and the right shows the fused final ranking. Comparing where the same chunk lands across columns tells you whether BM25 or vector "gets" this query better.

basic.demoBody: Searching for "camera" won't match "camcorder". To understand synonyms you need to wire up a real embedding model.
basic.semanticBody: Searching for "camera" will match phrases like "camcorder" too.
basic.noModelsBodySuffix: and add an OpenAI or Aliyun Bailian provider with an API key — usable models will show up here.
basic.switchModelHint: Switching a KB's embedding model requires recomputing every "semantic fingerprint" (reindex). v0 doesn't hot-swap yet — to switch, delete this KB and recreate it with the new model.

danger.heading: Delete knowledge base
danger.warningPrefix: Soft delete · recoverable by an admin within 30 days. After that, all documents and vectors are removed permanently. The raw uploaded files stay on disk under (
danger.warningSuffix: ) and have to be cleaned up manually.
danger.confirmFieldLabel: Type the KB name "{name}" to confirm

detail.loadingChunksDesc: Reading each chunk's offsets, section, and page
detail.emptyChunks: This document has no chunks (parsed empty)
